keyName.description: Signet identity name in ~/.signet/identities/. The plugin shells out to the local `signet` CLI to sign with this key.

target.description: Logical target written into receipt.action.target. Recommended: openclaw://gateway/<gatewayId>.

policy.description: Optional path to a Signet policy YAML. If set and the policy denies a tool call, the plugin returns {block:true} from before_tool_call.

trustBundle.description: Optional path to a Signet trust bundle YAML/JSON. Reserved for future verification flows; currently surfaced for parity with verify CLI.

auditDir.description: Override SIGNET_HOME for the audit log directory. Defaults to the CLI default (~/.signet).

passphraseEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the keystore passphrase. Defaults to SIGNET_PASSPHRASE.

encryptParams.description: When true, store action.params encrypted in the audit log (XChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope keyed off the signing key).

signetBin.description: Path to the `signet` binary. Defaults to whatever is on PATH.

blockOnSignFailure.description: When true, a signing or policy failure aborts the tool call. When false, failures are logged and the call proceeds.
